name: Buddy Context Pressure Check
description: A deterministic Buddy runtime tool that checks whether conversation context, capability results, or public replies should be compacted before the next LLM turn.

inputSchema.name: Rendered Conversation History
inputSchema.description: The compact history that the main LLM will see.

inputSchema.name: Latest Context Compaction Summary
inputSchema.description: Summary generated earlier in the same visible Buddy loop, if any.

inputSchema.name: Public Response
inputSchema.description: Latest visible reply draft or final reply.

outputSchema.name: Needs Context Compaction
outputSchema.description: True when the Buddy loop should run buddy_context_compaction before the next LLM turn.

outputSchema.name: Context Compaction Trigger
outputSchema.description: Normalized trigger to pass into buddy_context_compaction.
